instruction:
The number of bacteria in a refrigerated food product is given by $N(T)=28 T^2-132 T+59$, $5 < T < 35$ where $T$ is the temperature of the food. When the food is removed from the refrigerator, the temperature is given by $T(t)=4 t+1.3$, where $t$ is the time in hours. Find the composite function $N(T(t))$: $N(T(t))=$ [ANS]
Find the time when the bacteria count reaches 21513 Time Needed=[ANS]
